title: HubSpot vs Zoho Campaigns (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: HubSpot vs Zoho Campaigns: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
h1: HubSpot vs Zoho Campaigns: Side-by-Side Comparison (2025)
intro: Choosing between HubSpot and Zoho Campaigns comes down to your specific use case. HubSpot is built for businesses that want email and CRM in one platform, while Zoho Campaigns targets Zoho users and budget-conscious businesses.

comparison_table.tool_a: Businesses That Want Email And Crm In One Platform

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on businesses that want email and CRM in one platform
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on Zoho users and budget-conscious businesses

faq.q: Is HubSpot better than Zoho Campaigns?
faq.a: It depends on your use case. HubSpot wins for businesses that want email and CRM in one platform, while Zoho Campaigns is stronger for Zoho users and budget-conscious businesses.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, HubSpot or Zoho Campaigns?
faq.a: Zoho Campaigns starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Zoho Campaigns to HubSpot?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
